heading: Omitted
label: 366 to 367 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 366 to 367, which related to registers at land offices, were omitted in view of Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1946, § 403, eff. , , set out in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, which abolished the office of land register and transferred its functions to the Secretary of the Interior.July 16, 194660 Stat. 1100Section 366, , , which related to registers at land offices at Anchorage, Nome, and Fairbanks, was subsequently repealed by , , .act Oct. 9, 1942, ch. 584, § 256 Stat. 779Pub. L. 89–554, § 8(a)80 Stat. 651Sept. 6, 1966Section 366a, , , which related to additional registers, was subsequently repealed by , , .act Oct. 9, 1942, ch. 584, § 356 Stat. 779Pub. L. 89–554, § 8(a)80 Stat. 651Sept. 6, 1966Section 367, , , related to duties of registers.act Oct. 9, 1942, ch. 584, § 456 Stat. 779
